title: Better Than Deep-Fried
description: A Shitpost Mod That Changes (Almost) Everything in BTA Deep-Fried, My Fingers Hurt.
body:
A shitpost mod that changes (almost) everything in BTA vanilla (for now) Deep-Fried besides GUI and item textures, because that would just be annoying.

Changes the audio to be very loud and crispy textures.

May include actual items and who knows what in the future, only time will tell.

Shoutout to Khepclack for figuring out why sounds weren't working.
